untranslatable_reason: Eve & Eve Double Top requires identification of two distinct peaks of similar height separated by a U-shaped valley (rounding turn). This multi-bar pattern structure with specific geometric relationships cannot be fully expressed using single-bar or simple moving average indicators. The 'confirmation line (nose position)' reference for exits lacks explicit quantitative definition in the pattern description. Pattern detection would require multi-bar lookback logic and peak/valley identification beyond available indicator set.
